name: PFDataTable
description: Ledger surface for structured records, scanning, and predictable actions.
responsibility: Display structured records for scanning, comparison, filtering, and action.

requirements: Sorting and filtering controls must be programmatically described.
Keyboard users must be able to reach interactive cells and toolbar controls.

composition_rules: Sorting and filtering controls must be clear.
anti_patterns: using tables for unstructured narrative content
hiding primary data under unclear controls
packing too many unrelated row actions into one column
